_readme: UI chrome, onboarding, and safety-gate copy in English, Kiswahili, and Sheng. The self-harm screener question and referral gate were removed 2026-07-19 at Ida's direction (no IRB coverage for this demo, no real referral pathway behind it). The safety.apnea block is still sensitive content: its contact-adjacent guidance should be read alongside the app's own README before this is shown to anyone outside the team.

tagline.en: A research demonstration for the Better Sleep Study
tagline.sw: Onyesho la utafiti kwa ajili ya Better Sleep Study
tagline.sheng: Research demo ya Better Sleep Study

whatThisIsBody.en: This is a research demonstration, not a medical device. It shows how a future companion app would compute a sleep-restriction window from your own diary, using a fixed rule, not a guess. Nothing here is sent anywhere: everything stays on this device. The deployed version, built with the Busara Center for Behavioral Economics, is what the grant behind this demo would fund.
whatThisIsBody.sw: Hii ni onyesho la utafiti, si kifaa cha matibabu. Inaonyesha jinsi programu ya baadaye ingehesabu dirisha la kupunguza usingizi kutoka kwa shajara yako mwenyewe, kwa kutumia kanuni thabiti, si kubahatisha. Hakuna kinachotumwa popote hapa: kila kitu kinabaki kwenye kifaa hiki. Toleo litakalotumika, lililojengwa pamoja na Busara Center for Behavioral Economics, ndilo ambalo ruzuku nyuma ya onyesho hili ingefadhili.
whatThisIsBody.sheng: Hii ni research demo, sio kifaa cha matibabu. Inaonyesha jinsi app ya baadaye ingecalculate window ya kupunguza sleep kutoka diary yako mwenyewe, ikitumia rule fixed, sio kubahatisha. Hakuna kitu kinatumwa popote hapa: kila kitu kinabaki kwa kifaa hiki. Toleo litakalotumika, lililojengwa pamoja na Busara Center for Behavioral Economics, ndio ambayo grant nyuma ya demo hii ingefund.

offlineNote.en: Works with no internet after your first visit. Try turning off your connection and reloading.
offlineNote.sw: Inafanya kazi bila intaneti baada ya ziara yako ya kwanza. Jaribu kuzima muunganisho wako kisha upakie upya.
offlineNote.sheng: Inafanya kazi bila internet baada ya visit yako ya kwanza. Try kuzima connection yako kisha ureload.

screenerIntro.en: One quick question, for your safety. Your answer stays on this device.
screenerIntro.sw: Swali moja la haraka, kwa usalama wako. Jibu lako linabaki kwenye kifaa hiki.
screenerIntro.sheng: Swali moja haraka, kwa usalama wako. Jibu lako linabaki kwa kifaa hiki.

screenerApnea.en: Does anyone tell you that you snore loudly and seem to stop breathing for a moment while you sleep?
screenerApnea.sw: Je, kuna mtu anakuambia unakoroma sana na unaonekana kuacha kupumua kwa muda ukiwa umelala?
screenerApnea.sheng: Je, kuna mtu anakuambia unasnore sana na unaonekana kuacha kupumua kwa muda ukiwa umelala?

wakeTimeLabel.en: Choose the wake-up time you can keep every day, including weekends
wakeTimeLabel.sw: Chagua muda wa kuamka unaoweza kudumisha kila siku, hata wikendi
wakeTimeLabel.sheng: Chagua wake time unayoweza kudumisha kila siku, hata weekend

source.en: Same 8 questions as the paper diary used in the pilot.
source.sw: Maswali 8 sawa na shajara ya karatasi iliyotumika kwenye jaribio.
source.sheng: Maswali 8 sawa na diary ya karatasi iliyotumika kwa pilot.

examplesTitle.en: In a hurry? Try an example night
examplesTitle.sw: Una haraka? Jaribu usiku wa mfano
examplesTitle.sheng: Una haraka? Jaribu night ya mfano

examplesBody.en: Each one fills in and saves a realistic night so you can immediately see how the Ask screen responds differently to different diaries.
examplesBody.sw: Kila mmoja unajaza na kuhifadhi usiku wa uhalisia ili uone mara moja jinsi skrini ya Uliza inavyojibu tofauti kwa shajara tofauti.
examplesBody.sheng: Kila moja inajaza na kusave night ya uhalisia ili uone mara moja jinsi Ask screen inavyojibu tofauti kwa diaries tofauti.

exampleLoadedNote.en: Example night saved. Go to Ask and tap a topic to see the tailored response.
exampleLoadedNote.sw: Usiku wa mfano umehifadhiwa. Nenda Uliza na ugusa mada ili uone jibu lililolengwa.
exampleLoadedNote.sheng: Night ya mfano imesave. Enda Ask na ugusa topic ili uone response iliyolengwa.

napMin.en: How long did you nap yesterday? (0 if no naps, minutes)
napMin.sw: Ulilala mchana kwa muda gani jana? (0 kama hukulala, dakika)
napMin.sheng: Ulilala mchana kwa muda gani jana? (0 kama hukulala, dakika)

bedTime.en: What time did you get into bed last night?
bedTime.sw: Uliingia kitandani saa ngapi jana usiku?
bedTime.sheng: Uliingia bedani saa ngapi jana usiku?

sleepTryTime.en: What time did you close your eyes intending to sleep?
sleepTryTime.sw: Ulifumba macho saa ngapi ukiwa na nia ya kulala?
sleepTryTime.sheng: Ulifumba macho saa ngapi ukiwa na nia ya kulala?

solMin.en: How long did it take you to fall asleep? (minutes)

wasoMin.en: How long were you awake in the middle of the night? (minutes)
wasoMin.sw: Ulikuwa macho kwa muda gani katikati ya usiku? (dakika)
wasoMin.sheng: Ulikuwa umeamka kwa muda gani katikati ya usiku? (dakika)

wakeTime.en: What time did you wake up for the last time this morning?
wakeTime.sw: Uliamka saa ngapi kwa mara ya mwisho asubuhi hii?
wakeTime.sheng: Uliamka saa ngapi kwa mara ya mwisho asubuhi hii?

outOfBedTime.en: What time did you get out of bed this morning?
outOfBedTime.sw: Ulitoka kitandani saa ngapi asubuhi hii?
outOfBedTime.sheng: Ulitoka bedani saa ngapi asubuhi hii?

interferenceTitle.en: Did any of these interfere with your sleep last night?
interferenceTitle.sw: Je, kuna lolote kati ya haya lililoathiri usingizi wako jana usiku?
interferenceTitle.sheng: Je, kuna lolote kati ya hizi lilikuinterfere sleep yako jana usiku?

interferenceTemperature.en: Temperature: too hot or too cold
interferenceTemperature.sw: Joto: moto sana au baridi sana
interferenceTemperature.sheng: Joto: moto sana ama baridi sana

interferenceNoise.en: Noise: from outside or from other people in the house
interferenceNoise.sw: Kelele: kutoka nje au kutoka kwa watu wengine nyumbani
interferenceNoise.sheng: Noise: kutoka nje ama kutoka kwa watu wengine nyumbani

interferenceWorryWork.en: Worrying about work and work-related things
interferenceWorryWork.sw: Kuwa na wasiwasi kuhusu kazi na mambo yanayohusiana na kazi
interferenceWorryWork.sheng: Kuworry kuhusu kazi na mambo za job

interferenceWorryFamily.en: Worrying about family and family-related things
interferenceWorryFamily.sw: Kuwa na wasiwasi kuhusu familia na mambo yanayohusiana na familia
interferenceWorryFamily.sheng: Kuworry kuhusu family na mambo za nyumbani

sleepinessTitle.en: How sleepy did you feel during the day yesterday?

sleepinessDangerous.en: So sleepy I nearly dozed off during something like walking, working with tools, or crossing the road
sleepinessDangerous.sw: Nilisinzia sana hadi karibu kulala nikiwa kwenye kitu kama kutembea, kutumia zana, au kuvuka barabara
sleepinessDangerous.sheng: Nilisinzia sana mpaka nikaribia kulala nikiwa kwenye kitu kama kutembea, kutumia tools, ama kuvuka barabara

savedNote.en: Saved. Your window will update below.
savedNote.sw: Imehifadhiwa. Dirisha lako litabadilika hapa chini.
savedNote.sheng: Imesave. Window yako itabadilika hapa chini.

incompleteNote.en: Please fill every question; this is what keeps the calculation honest.
incompleteNote.sw: Tafadhali jaza kila swali; hii ndiyo inayoweka hesabu kuwa sahihi.
incompleteNote.sheng: Tafadhali jaza kila swali; hii ndio inaweka calculation iwe sahihi.

implausibleNote.en: These times do not add up (check them against each other). This night was excluded from your weekly average, the same way the study team handles diary entries that cannot be correct.
implausibleNote.sw: Nyakati hizi hazilingani (zikague dhidi ya nyingine). Usiku huu umeondolewa kwenye wastani wako wa wiki, kama timu ya utafiti inavyoshughulikia maingizo ya shajara yasiyowezekana kuwa sahihi.
implausibleNote.sheng: Hizi times hazilingani (zicheki dhidi ya zingine). Usiku huu umeondolewa kwa average yako ya week, sawa na vile study team inashughulikia diary entries ambazo haziwezi kuwa sahihi.

needMoreData.en: Log at least 3 nights of diary data to see your first window. The real program waits for 5 nights in a rolling week before adjusting it further.
needMoreData.sw: Weka angalau usiku 3 za data ya shajara ili kuona dirisha lako la kwanza. Programu halisi inasubiri usiku 5 kwenye wiki inayozunguka kabla ya kulirekebisha zaidi.
needMoreData.sheng: Log angalau nights 3 za diary data ili kuona window yako ya kwanza. Program halisi inasubiri nights 5 kwa rolling week kabla ya kuiadjust zaidi.

bedtimeLabel.en: Go to bed no earlier than

baselineNote.en: This is your first window: the average sleep you actually got over your first {n} nights, rounded to the nearest 15 minutes. Your facilitator will adjust it weekly from here.
baselineNote.sw: Hili ni dirisha lako la kwanza: wastani wa usingizi uliopata kweli katika usiku {n} za kwanza, ukizungushwa hadi dakika 15 za karibu. Mwezeshaji wako atalirekebisha kila wiki kuanzia hapa.
baselineNote.sheng: Hii ni window yako ya kwanza: average ya sleep uliopata kweli kwa nights {n} za kwanza, iliyozungushwa hadi dakika 15 za karibu. Facilitator wako ataiadjust kila week kuanzia hapa.

meanSELabel.en: Average sleep efficiency over the last {n} valid nights
meanSELabel.sw: Wastani wa ufanisi wa usingizi kwa usiku {n} halali za mwisho
meanSELabel.sheng: Average sleep efficiency kwa nights {n} valid za mwisho

actionExtend.en: This is at or above 85%, so your window grows by 15 minutes.
actionExtend.sw: Hii iko sawa au juu ya 85%, hivyo dirisha lako linaongezeka kwa dakika 15.
actionExtend.sheng: Hii iko sawa ama juu ya 85%, kwa hivyo window yako inaongezeka na dakika 15.

actionHold.en: This is between 80% and 85%, so your window holds steady.
actionHold.sw: Hii iko kati ya 80% na 85%, hivyo dirisha lako linabaki sawa.
actionHold.sheng: Hii iko kati ya 80% na 85%, kwa hivyo window yako inabaki vile ilivyo.

actionReduce.en: This is below 80%, so your window shrinks by 15 minutes.
actionReduce.sw: Hii iko chini ya 80%, hivyo dirisha lako linapungua kwa dakika 15.
actionReduce.sheng: Hii iko chini ya 80%, kwa hivyo window yako inapungua na dakika 15.

clampedNote.en: The rule would have gone shorter, but this program never prescribes less than 5 hours.
clampedNote.sw: Kanuni ingelipunguza zaidi, lakini programu hii kamwe haitoi maagizo ya chini ya masaa 5.
clampedNote.sheng: Rule ingepunguza zaidi, lakini program hii haitoi chini ya masaa 5, kamwe.

sourceNote.en: Rule: mean sleep efficiency over the last 7 nights (minimum 5 nights with data). 85% or higher extends the window 15 minutes; 80 to 85% holds; below 80% reduces it 15 minutes. Never below 5 hours. Source: session2_slides.tex.
sourceNote.sw: Kanuni: wastani wa ufanisi wa usingizi kwa usiku 7 za mwisho (angalau usiku 5 zenye data). 85% au zaidi inaongeza dirisha kwa dakika 15; 80 hadi 85% inabaki sawa; chini ya 80% inapunguza kwa dakika 15. Kamwe si chini ya masaa 5. Chanzo: session2_slides.tex.
sourceNote.sheng: Rule: average sleep efficiency kwa nights 7 za mwisho (angalau nights 5 zenye data). 85% ama zaidi inaongeza window na dakika 15; 80 hadi 85% inabaki vile ilivyo; chini ya 80% inapunguza na dakika 15. Haiwezi kuwa chini ya masaa 5, kamwe. Chanzo: session2_slides.tex.

title.en: This needs a different kind of care
title.sw: Hii inahitaji aina tofauti ya matunzo
title.sheng: Hii inahitaji aina tofauti ya care

body.en: Loud snoring together with pauses in breathing during sleep can be a sign of a condition this program does not treat, called sleep apnea. This app will stop giving sleep-window advice until this has been checked by a clinician. Please tell your study facilitator so they can arrange a referral.
body.sw: Kukoroma sana pamoja na kusimama kwa kupumua wakati wa kulala kunaweza kuwa ishara ya hali ambayo programu hii haitibu, inayoitwa apnea ya usingizi. Programu hii itasimamisha ushauri wa dirisha la kulala hadi hali hii ichunguzwe na daktari. Tafadhali mwambie mwezeshaji wako wa utafiti ili apange rufaa.
body.sheng: Ku-snore sana pamoja na kusimama kwa breathing wakati wa kulala inaweza kuwa ishara ya condition ambayo program hii haitreat, inaitwa sleep apnea. App hii itasimamisha advice ya sleep window mpaka hii ichekiwe na daktari. Tafadhali mwambie facilitator wako wa study ili apange referral.

body.en: You reported being dangerously sleepy, close to falling asleep during an activity where that would be unsafe. Do not drive, operate machinery, or do anything else where dozing off could hurt you or someone else, until you have had proper rest. This can happen in the early days of a shorter window and should ease, but your safety matters more than the schedule right now.
body.sw: Uliripoti kusinzia kwa hatari, karibu kulala wakati wa shughuli ambapo hilo lingekuwa hatari. Usiendeshe gari, wala kutumia mashine, wala kufanya lolote lingine ambapo kusinzia kunaweza kukudhuru wewe au mtu mwingine, hadi upate mapumziko ya kutosha. Hili linaweza kutokea siku za mwanzo za dirisha fupi na linapaswa kupungua, lakini usalama wako ni muhimu zaidi kuliko ratiba sasa hivi.
body.sheng: Ulireport kusinzia kwa hatari, karibu kulala wakati wa activity ambayo hiyo ingekuwa hatari. Usidrive, wala kutumia machine, wala kufanya kitu kingine chochote ambapo kusinzia kunaweza kukudhuru wewe ama mtu mwingine, mpaka upate rest ya kutosha. Hii inaweza kuhappen siku za kwanza za window fupi na inapaswa kupungua, lakini usalama wako ni muhimu zaidi kuliko schedule sasa hivi.

title.en: Your body may need more rest than the plan allows right now
title.sw: Huenda mwili wako unahitaji mapumziko zaidi kuliko mpango unaruhusu sasa hivi
title.sheng: Huenda mwili wako inahitaji rest zaidi kuliko mpango inaruhusu sasa hivi

body.en: You have reported feeling very sleepy on several days this week. This can be part of building sleep debt on purpose, but it can also mean the window needs a closer look sooner than the next session. Please mention this to your facilitator, and in the meantime avoid driving or machinery whenever you feel this sleepy.
body.sw: Umeripoti kusinzia sana kwa siku kadhaa wiki hii. Hili linaweza kuwa sehemu ya kujenga deni la usingizi kwa makusudi, lakini pia linaweza kumaanisha dirisha linahitaji kuangaliwa kwa karibu mapema kuliko kikao kijacho. Tafadhali mwambie mwezeshaji wako, na wakati huo huo epuka kuendesha gari au mashine wakati wowote unaposinzia hivi.
body.sheng: Umereport kusinzia sana kwa siku kadhaa week hii. Hii inaweza kuwa part ya kubuild sleep debt on purpose, lakini pia inaweza kumaanisha window inahitaji kuangaliwa karibu mapema kuliko session inayofuata. Tafadhali mwambie facilitator wako, na wakati huo huo epuka kudrive ama machine wakati wowote unaposinzia hivi.

title.en: This is as short as this program allows
title.sw: Hii ndio kifupi zaidi programu hii inaruhusu
title.sheng: Hii ndio short zaidi ambayo program hii inaruhusu

body.en: Your calculated window has reached the shortest this program permits, five hours. The window will not be shortened further. Please speak to your study facilitator before your next session so they can review your diary with you in person.
body.sw: Dirisha lako lililokokotolewa limefikia kifupi zaidi ambacho programu hii inaruhusu, masaa matano. Dirisha halitapunguzwa zaidi. Tafadhali ongea na mwezeshaji wako wa utafiti kabla ya kikao chako kijacho ili apitie shajara yako nawe ana kwa ana.
body.sheng: Window yako iliyocalculatiwa imefika short zaidi ambayo program hii inaruhusu, masaa matano. Window haitapunguzwa zaidi. Tafadhali ongea na facilitator wako wa study kabla ya session yako inayofuata ili apitie diary yako nawe face to face.

subtitle.en: Tap what happened. Answers use your own diary, not a guess, and never leave this device.
subtitle.sw: Gusa kilichotokea. Majibu yanatumia shajara yako mwenyewe, si kubahatisha, na hayatoki kwenye kifaa hiki.
subtitle.sheng: Gusa kilichohappen. Answers zinatumia diary yako mwenyewe, sio kubahatisha, na haziwahi kutoka kwa kifaa hiki.

modeALabel.sw: Msaidizi wa maswali uliopangwa (nje ya mtandao, upo daima)

modeBLabel.en: Free-text question (needs your own API key)
modeBLabel.sw: Swali la kuandika mwenyewe (linahitaji ufunguo wako wa API)
modeBLabel.sheng: Swali la kuandika mwenyewe (linahitaji API key yako)

reassessBody.en: Retake the apnea question and update your wake-up time at any time. Your diary and window stay exactly as they are.
reassessBody.sw: Rudia swali la apnea na sasisha muda wako wa kuamka wakati wowote. Shajara yako na dirisha lako vitabaki kama vilivyo.
reassessBody.sheng: Rudia swali la apnea na usasishe wake time yako wakati wowote. Diary yako na window yako vitabaki kama vilivyo.

byokTitle.en: Optional: try the chat demo (free key)
byokTitle.sw: Hiari: jaribu chat demo (ufunguo wa bure)
byokTitle.sheng: Hiari: jaribu chat demo (key ya bure)

byokBody.en: This is a demo affordance for reviewers only, not part of the real product. Get a free API key with no credit card at console.groq.com, paste it below, and the Ask screen will answer free-text questions with a small open model instead of the scripted library. Your key is stored only in this browser and is sent directly from your device to Groq; it never touches any server we control.
byokBody.sw: Hii ni njia ya onyesho kwa wakaguzi tu, si sehemu ya bidhaa halisi. Pata ufunguo wa API bila malipo bila kadi ya benki kwenye console.groq.com, ubandike hapa chini, na skrini ya Uliza itajibu maswali ya kuandika mwenyewe kwa modeli ndogo huru badala ya maktaba iliyopangwa. Ufunguo wako unahifadhiwa tu kwenye kivinjari hiki na unatumwa moja kwa moja kutoka kifaa chako hadi Groq; hauguzi seva yoyote tunayodhibiti.
byokBody.sheng: Hii ni demo affordance kwa reviewers tu, sio part ya product halisi. Pata free API key bila credit card kwa console.groq.com, uipaste hapa chini, na Ask screen itajibu free-text questions ikitumia small open model badala ya scripted library. Key yako inahifadhiwa tu kwa browser hii na inatumwa moja kwa moja kutoka kifaa chako mpaka Groq; haiguzi server yoyote tunayodhibiti.

byokKeyLabel.en: API key (kept in this browser only)
byokKeyLabel.sw: Ufunguo wa API (unabaki kwenye kivinjari hiki tu)
byokKeyLabel.sheng: API key (inabaki kwa browser hii tu)

resetBody.en: Deletes everything you entered on this device: diary nights, your window, and the safety screener answers.
resetBody.sw: Inafuta kila kitu ulichoingiza kwenye kifaa hiki: usiku za shajara, dirisha lako, na majibu ya uchunguzi wa usalama.
resetBody.sheng: Inafuta kila kitu uliingiza kwa kifaa hiki: diary nights, window yako, na majibu ya safety screener.

resetConfirm.en: This cannot be undone. Delete everything?
resetConfirm.sw: Hili haliwezi kutenguliwa. Futa kila kitu?
resetConfirm.sheng: Hii haiwezi kutenguliwa. Futa kila kitu?
